request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden? Just last year, [Allied Nation] cut their military spending by 15%—yet they still expect our unconditional support. This isn't just about money; it's about national security. When allies don't pull their weight, our deterrence weakens. We can't afford to be the only ones committed to our alliances. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider our commitments. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
